name: Luchadors
teaser: Search for and play actions on other players' minions, especially Set-Up actions, as a requirement to activate or play cards with much greater effects.
mechanics: Search for and play actions on other players' minions, especially Set-Up actions, as a requirement to activate or play cards with much greater effects.

name: Mounties
teaser: Move to bases where there are other players' minions and buff your minions on bases where other players' minions are present.
mechanics: Move to bases where there are other players' minions and buff your minions on bases where other players' minions are present.

name: Musketeers
teaser: Chain a lot of extra actions that can directly affect your own minions and gain even more power, card draw and extra action as a benefit.
mechanics: Chain a lot of extra actions that can directly affect your own minions and gain even more power, card draw and extra action as a benefit.

name: Sumo Wrestlers
teaser: Discard cards to gain power, move other players' minions away from bases where you have minions and draw a lot of cards.
mechanics: Discard cards to gain power, move other players' minions away from bases where you have minions and draw a lot of cards.
